title: SST ↔ CTD surface temperature cross-validation
text:
Cross-source validation: Satellite SST vs CTD surface temperature.
  Paired observations: 24
  Agreement (within ±2.0°C): 24/24 (100%)
  Mean |ΔT|: 0.92°C
  Mean reliability score: 0.771
  Onagawa Bay: 24/24 agree, mean |ΔT|=0.92°C

title: Temporal gap interpolation via satellite SST
text:
Temporal gap filling: SST-based surface temperature interpolation.
  Total SST days available: 79
  Days in CTD gaps: 79
  Interpolated T range: 6.5–12.8°C
  Mean confidence: 0.916
  High confidence (>0.7): 79 days

title: Environment-based diversity prediction and anomalies
text:
Diversity prediction: CTD environment → expected Shannon diversity.
  Samples evaluated: 37
  Anomalies (>2.0σ deviation): 1
  Mean |deviation|: 0.80σ
  Anomalous samples:
    2024-07-O-s1 (Onagawa Bay): predicted H'=3.453, actual=1.601 (-2.3σ)

title: Cross-source corroboration summary
text:
Cross-source corroboration summary.
  Total observations: 207
  Verified (multi-source agreement): 37
  Supported (partial corroboration): 20
  Standalone (single source): 150
  Mean reliability score: 0.435

    2024-04-O-s1: Diversity matches prediction (-0.2σ) | Multi-modal sample (CTD + metagenome)
